questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with bit A pointing to the LEFT with the solved board configuration, describe the path of the blue ball.
questions.answer: The blue ball drops from (2,-1), rolls through the ramps at (1,8), (2,7), (3,8), (4,9), (5,10), landing on bit A which points left, directing the ball to the interceptor at (8,9) - intercepting a blue ball.

questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with bit A pointing to the RIGHT with the solved board configuration, describe the path of the balls.
questions.answer: The blue ball drops from (2,-1), rolls through the ramps to the right lever, triggering the release of a red ball. The red ball then rolls through the left-side ramps (7,10), (8,11) into the interceptor - intercepting a red ball.

questions.question: Based on the starting state of bit A, what color ball gets intercepted?
questions.answer: If bit A starts pointing LEFT, a blue ball is intercepted. If bit A starts pointing RIGHT, a red ball is intercepted.
